name: Amy Rose/There's something about Amy
description:
She's not your Amy… or maybe she is.
Torn through dimensions in a desperate search for her Sonic, this version of Amy is obsessed, unpredictable, and dangerously affectionate.

You’ve just met her… but something about you feels familiar to her. Are you the one she's looking for? Or just another mistake?

Careful what you say. Careful how you look.
If she thinks you're him... you might just be her everything.
If you're not? Well... let's hope she stays calm.



AMY WITH BIG TITTIES! 🗣💥

Loved the mashed animations and channel in general, and well this version of Amy looks cool and all tragic and all crazy and all and all and-
https://www.youtube.com/@mashed
